code.description: The code for the schedulingGroup to represent an external identifier. This field must be unique within the team in Microsoft Teams and uses an alphanumeric format, with a maximum of 100 characters.

displayName.description: The display name for the schedulingGroup. Required.

isActive.description: Indicates whether the schedulingGroup can be used when creating new entities or updating existing ones. Required.

userIds.description: The list of user IDs that are a member of the schedulingGroup. Required.
